 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "md--9169109",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Token attribution visualization\n",
    "\n",
    "**Business context:** Stakeholders rarely accept raw attribution vectors. Colored token and bar views make Shapley/Banzhaf results legible in compliance reviews and product postmortems.\n",
    "\n",
    "**Goal:** Run a tiny exact explain job and render per-token attributions with both built-in renderers.\n",
    "\n",
    "**Prerequisites:** `nlp-shap[viz]`, Python 3.12.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "code--5425501",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.548589Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.548443Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.768252Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.767809Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "from nlp_shap import ExplainConfig, ExplainRunner, render_attribution, render_attribution_html\n",
    "from nlp_shap.domain.conversation import ConversationSnapshot, Message, Turn\n",
    "from nlp_shap.domain.enums import Role\n",
    "from nlp_shap.masking.partitions import TokenPartitioner\n",
    "from nlp_shap.viz import display_attribution_html\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "md--5568595",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Explain a short refund-policy prompt (mock backend)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "code--6995034",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.769563Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.769449Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.796525Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.796280Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "[('52cbdb1ef10bf5b8:0:0:0', 0.20276778617681523),\n",
       " ('52cbdb1ef10bf5b8:0:0:1', 0.10569416373025316),\n",
       " ('52cbdb1ef10bf5b8:0:0:2', 0.17861186878496496),\n",
       " ('52cbdb1ef10bf5b8:0:0:3', 0.2515295738396768)]"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 2,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "snapshot = ConversationSnapshot.from_turns((\n",
    "    Turn(messages=(Message(role=Role.USER, text=\"refund within thirty days\"),)),\n",
    "))\n",
    "config = ExplainConfig.model_validate({\n",
    "    \"backend\": {\"kind\": \"mock\", \"model_id\": \"stub\"},\n",
    "    \"generation\": {\"max_new_tokens\": 6, \"temperature\": 0.0, \"precompute_base\": True},\n",
    "    \"explanation\": {\n",
    "        \"estimator\": \"exact\",\n",
    "        \"estimand\": \"shapley\",\n",
    "        \"value_fn\": \"tfidf_cosine\",\n",
    "        \"normalizer\": \"identity\",\n",
    "        \"players\": \"tokens\",\n",
    "        \"absence_policy\": \"pad\",\n",
    "        \"budget\": {\"fraction\": 1.0},\n",
    "        \"seed\": 0,\n",
    "    },\n",
    "})\n",
    "output = await ExplainRunner(config).explain(snapshot)\n",
    "player_set = TokenPartitioner().partition(snapshot)\n",
    "list(zip(player_set.player_ids, output.result.values))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "md--7149361",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## SHAP-style colored tokens\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "code-88850386",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.797574Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.797514Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.827864Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.827438Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 600x180 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "text/html": [
       "<div><strong>Shapley token attributions</strong><br/><span style=\"background-color:rgba(173,22,42,1.00);padding:2px 4px;margin:1px;border-radius:4px;\">refund</span> <span style=\"background-color:rgba(241,158,124,1.00);padding:2px 4px;margin:1px;border-radius:4px;\">within</span> <span style=\"background-color:rgba(194,56,58,1.00);padding:2px 4px;margin:1px;border-radius:4px;\">thirty</span> <span style=\"background-color:rgba(103,0,31,1.00);padding:2px 4px;margin:1px;border-radius:4px;\">days</span></div>"
      ],
      "text/plain": [
       "<IPython.core.display.HTML object>"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "text_fig = render_attribution(output, snapshot, player_set, renderer=\"token_text\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "display_attribution_html(output, snapshot, player_set)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "md-72312153",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Horizontal bars sorted by impact\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "code-68368702",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.828856Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.828793Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.858441Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-15T08:29:50.857978Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 800x250 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "bar_fig = render_attribution(output, snapshot, player_set, renderer=\"token_bar\")\n",
    "plt.show()\n",
    "html = render_attribution_html(output, snapshot, player_set, title=\"Notebook HTML export\")\n",
    "assert \"background-color\" in html\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
